title: Career Path & Karma #tarot #apratihast
description:
Jai shree krishna,
Earth souls I am the founder of @Divinationpathbyhema offering different services to bring a change and solve the issues through krishnas messages.

 / divinationpathbyhema  
  
 / @divinationpathbyhema1678  

Join Ashutosh Pratihast in this riveting video podcast as he delves into the intriguing world of Tarot Card Reading alongside the renowned practitioner, Divination by Hema. Gain invaluable insights into the age-old question - is Tarot Card Reading a genuine practice or merely a hoax? This enlightening discussion explores the realms of Astrology and Black Magic, offering viewers a comprehensive understanding of these mystical arts.

In this engaging episode, Ashutosh and Hema dissect the nuances of Tarot Card Reading, shedding light on its origins, significance, and its impact on individuals seeking guidance. Through Hema's expertise, discover the profound connections between the cards and their ability to provide clarity in various aspects of life, from relationships to career decisions.

Prepare to be captivated as the conversation transcends into the world of Astrology, where celestial bodies wield influence over our destinies. Gain insights into the alignments and positions that shape our lives, as Ashutosh and Hema demystify the intricacies of this ancient practice.

Furthermore, explore the enigmatic realm of Black Magic, a subject often clouded in misconception and intrigue. Through Hema's expertise, unravel the truths behind this esoteric art form, distinguishing fact from fiction.

This podcast episode promises to be an eye-opening journey for both skeptics and believers alike. Dive deep into the mystical world of Tarot Card Reading, Astrology, and Black Magic, guided by the expertise of Ashutosh Pratihast and Divination by Hema. Don't miss out on this opportunity to expand your horizons and gain a fresh perspective on these age-old practices.

Tune in now for an enriching experience that promises to leave you with newfound knowledge and a deeper appreciation for the mystical arts. Subscribe, like, and share to be a part of this enlightening conversation!
